burn-onnx.name: burn-onnx
burn-onnx.description: Converts ONNX models to native Rust code for inference using the Burn deep learning framework.
burn-onnx.long_description: burn-onnx converts ONNX models into type-safe Rust source code and optimized weight files for the Burn deep learning framework. Unlike runtime interpreters, it generates native Rust code at build time, enabling compile-time verification, backend-agnostic execution across CPUs and GPUs, and zero-overhead inference without requiring an external runtime dependency.
